name: S-Force Gravitino
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｓ－Ｆｏｒｃｅ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>セキュリティ・フォース</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> グラビティーノ
desc: Each of your opponent's monsters in the same column as one of your "S-Force" monsters is banished when it leaves the field. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "S-Force" card from your Deck to your hand, except "S-Force Gravitino". You can only use this effect of "S-Force Gravitino" once per turn.
mnst_eff: Each of your opponent's monsters in the same column as one of your "S-Force" monsters is banished when it leaves the field. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "S-Force" card from your Deck to your hand, except "S-Force Gravitino". You can only use this effect of "S-Force Gravitino" once per turn.
eff: Each of your opponent's monsters in the same column as one of your "S-Force" monsters is banished when it leaves the field. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "S-Force" card from your Deck to your hand, except "S-Force Gravitino". You can only use this effect of "S-Force Gravitino" once per turn.

banished: Banishes cards when they leave the field
